_meta.description: Live compose-time style contract sourced from runtime style decisions and composition banks.

content.any: Composition style contract: use voice profile {{voiceProfile}} with domain modifier {{domainVoiceModifier}} and interaction modifier {{interactionModifier}}. Use opener family {{openerFamily}}, rhythm profile {{rhythmProfile}}, paragraph plan {{paragraphPlan}}, answer strategy {{answerStrategy}}, template family {{templateFamily}}, claim-strength profile {{claimStrengthProfile}}, clarification policy {{clarificationPolicy}}, fallback posture {{fallbackPosture}}, and uncertainty band {{uncertaintyBand}}. Keep the answer natural and user-facing, not like a prompt template. Avoid generic lead-ins, visible macro phrasing, repeated sentence stems, and cross-turn opener echo. Apply this anti-robotic focus: {{antiRoboticFocus}}. Apply these repetition guards: {{repetitionGuard}}. Respect empathy budget {{empathyBudget}} and empathy mode {{empathyMode}}. Current turn-style state: {{turnStyleState}}. Current style key: {{turnStyleStateKey}}.
